{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53929", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary
With `NC_SECURE_ATTACHMENTS=true`, an authenticated uploader could deliver `.html` or
`.svg` attachments that the browser rendered inline from the NocoDB origin instead of
forcing a download.

### Details
The signed attachment handler stored response-header overrides under PascalCase keys
(`ResponseContentDisposition`, `ResponseContentType`) while the controller that served
the file read them under lowercase-hyphen names (`response-content-disposition`). The
mismatch dropped the `Content-Disposition: attachment` header, leaving Express to
auto-render `.html`, `.svg`, and similar inline. The fix corrects the key case and
additionally forces `Content-Disposition: attachment` and
`Content-Type: application/octet-stream` for any MIME type not on the preview
allowlist.

### Impact
Stored Cross-Site Scripting in the NocoDB origin from inline-rendered uploads. Script
executing in the victim's browser can read the auth JWT from `localStorage`.
Exploitation requires authenticated upload permission and the secure-attachment mode
to be enabled.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@bugbunny-research](https://github.com/bugbunny-research).
It was independently reported by [@DavidCarliez](https://github.com/DavidCarliez).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00288, "percentile": 0.20531}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53929"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Secure Attachment", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6mhr-74x2-98v9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Secure Attachment
